description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to ensure ssh-agent is available, installs openssh-client if missing, starts the agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh, and writes $SSH_SERVER_HOSTKEYS to known_hosts when inside a Docker container. Define a deploy job in the deploy stage that only runs on the develop and master branches. In the deploy job execute `ssh -p 2222 s225088@se.ifmo.ru "[[ ! -d public_html/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME ]] || rm -R public_html/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"` followed by `scp -P 2222 -r public_html s225088@se.ifmo.ru:/home/s225088/public_html/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`. No Docker image, services, caches, or artifacts are specified.
